title: 4 Preparing Receiver General Deposits (Federal Department and Agency Instructions)
body_text:
4	Preparing Receiver General Deposits (Federal Department and Agency Instructions)
4.1	Preparing Receiver General Deposits
Provide the procedures in this chapter to federal departments and agencies to assist them with preparing Receiver General items for deposit.
Prepare Receiver General items for deposit as follows:
Separate cheques and cash, and sort them by currency (i.e., Canadian dollar and US dollar).
Stamp the upper right quadrant of the back of each cheque in black ink with your Receiver General Concentrator holding account deposit endorsement stamp. The endorsement stamp must include the following text: ГўВҖВңFor deposit only to the credit of the Receiver General on behalf of [Entity name] Authorization Number (e.g., 12345). If dishonoured return to "71620-809.ГўВҖВқ See Figure 1.
Figure 1: Example Endorsement
US Dollar Items
Bundle US dollar cash and cheques separately. Your financial institution must convert US dollar items to Canadian dollars. Your financial institution will complete the Receiver General Account Deposit Slip, Form 6334, for US dollar items on your behalf.
Canadian Dollar Items
Canadian dollar Receiver General deposits may contain any combination of the following items. If necessary, submit more than one deposit.
A maximum of $4,000.00 in cash
A maximum of $50.00 in coin
A maximum of 260 cheques
Complete the Receiver General Account Deposit Slip, Form 6334, for Canadian dollar deposit items as follows. See Figure 2.
ГўВ‘
Department
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the appropriate departmental office of the Receiver General.
ГўВ‘ВЎ
Transit No.
ГўВҖВ“
Enter your branch transit and Financial Institution Number (FIN).
ГўВ‘Вў
Account No.
ГўВҖВ“
Enter the account number of the appropriate departmental office of the Receiver General.
ГўВ‘ВЈ
Date
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the date of deposit.
ГўВ‘ВӨ
Deposit Details
ГўВҖВ“ Enter the value of all cash and/or individual cheques and verify the deposit total.
Note:	The Deposit Total field automatically populates.
ГўВ‘ВҘ
DepositorГўВҖВҷs Signature
ГўВҖВ“ Sign the form. The person preparing the deposit must be the signatory.
Figure 2: Receiver General Account Deposit Slip, Form 6334
END
